logs

the main reason i bought my switch (besides wanting to be ablt to play games on my comfy bed) which is very funny because after putting in 500 hours into this game i kinda hate it! no offense. but i had fun in those 500 hours

if you are adding me to any of these, please send me a message or an e-mail to me know who you are! i don't accept requests from people i don't know :p
